content:
Heya, I think hyperlink or something like that in the Enlightens descriptions would be cool, it'll help to understand directly what card is affected by the bonus when you click on the name.
I am taking Vortice E1 as an example, which talk about "Vortex! Shell!" but you have to remember what this card is and go back to the Skills menu to check, while if it was a link I could just click on it and see the card itself.
